Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising approach for adaptive wind farm flow control, yet its practical deployment is hindered by slow training convergence and poor initial performance, factors that could translate to years of reduced power output if an untrained agent were deployed directly. This work investigates whether domain knowledge from steady-state wake models can accelerate RL training and improve initial controller performance. We propose a pretraining methodology in which expert demonstrations are generated by deploying a PyWake-based steady-state optimizer within a dynamic wake simulation (WindGym), then used to initialize both the actor and critic networks of a Soft Actor-Critic agent via behavior cloning. Experiments on a 2x2 wind farm show that pretraining eliminates the costly initial learning phase: while an untrained agent underperforms the greedy zero-yaw baseline by approximately 12%, pretraining raises initial performance to near-baseline levels. During online fine-tuning, all configurations converge within 250,000 environment steps to achieve similar performance, ultimately exceeding that of a lookup-table controller, which reaches approximately 7% power gain after 500,000 steps.

</details>


### [468] [Load constrained wind farm flow control through multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22795)
*Teodor Åstrand,Marcus Binder Nilsen,Iasonas Tsaklis,Tuhfe Göçmen,Pierre-Elouan Réthoré,Nikolay Dimitrov*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于负载约束风电场流动控制的多智能体强化学习框架，利用I-SAC架构和代理模型在不超过特定负载增长阈值下最大化发电量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尾流偏转可提升总发电量，但会增加下游风机结构负载，需平衡发电效率与负载约束。

Method: 采用独立软演员-评论家（I-SAC）架构，结合数据驱动的局部入流扇形区平均代理模型实时估计等效损伤载荷（DELs），并设计含负载阈值的奖励函数进行多智能体训练。

Result: 多智能体强化学习代理能够学习协同策略，在优先考虑功率增益的同时主动回避高DEL控制策略。

Conclusion: 该方法成功实现了在负载增加不超过10%、20%、30%阈值下最大化发电功率的目标。

Abstract: This study presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for load-constrained wind farm flow control (WFFC). While wake steering can enhance total wind farm power, it often introduces increased structural loads on downstream turbines. To address this, we integrate an Independent Soft Actor-Critic (I-SAC) architecture with a data-driven, local inflow sector-averaged surrogate model to provide real-time estimates of Damage Equivalent Loads (DELs). By incorporating these estimates into a shaped reward function, turbine-specific agents are trained to maximize power production while adhering to specific load-increase thresholds ($Δ_{max}$) of 10%, 20%, and 30% relative to a baseline controller. The framework is implemented within the WindGym environment using the DYNAMIKS flow solver with Dynamic Wake Meandering (DWM) model to capture non-stationary wake physics. Results indicate that the MARL agents successfully learn collaborative policies that prioritise power gain while actively retreating from high-DEL control strategies.

</details>


### [469] [Hierarchical RL-MPC Control for Dynamic Wake Steering in Wind Farms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22797)
*Marcus Binder Nilsen,Teodor Olof Benedict Åstrand,Tuhfe Göçmen,Pierre-Elouan Réthoré*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习与模型预测控制的分层框架，用于优化风电场尾流偏航控制。强化学习智能体学习为模型预测控制器提供补偿状态估计，而非直接控制涡轮机。在三涡轮机案例中，该方法比基线控制实现了23%的功率增益，并超越了拥有完美状态信息的理想化模型预测控制。与直接强化学习控制相比，该混合架构在训练期间保持了更优越的安全性，同时实现了相当的性能和更稳定的控制动作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 风电场尾流偏航优化因复杂的流动物理和变化的条件而具有挑战性。

Method: 分层框架：强化学习智能体学习补偿状态估计，为模型预测控制器提供支持。

Result: 三涡轮机案例中功率增益23%；超越拥有完美状态信息的理想化模型预测控制；与直接强化学习控制相比性能相当，但安全性更优、控制动作更稳定。

Conclusion: 提出的混合架构在保持安全性的同时有效提升了风电场尾流偏航控制的性能和稳定性。

Abstract: Wind farm wake steering optimization is challenging due to complex flow physics and changing conditions. This paper presents a hierarchical framework that combines reinforcement learning with model predictive control, where an RL agent learns compensatory state estimates for an MPC controller, rather than directly controlling turbines. Evaluated on a three-turbine case, the approach achieves a 23\% power gain over the baseline control and surpasses the idealized MPC with perfect state knowledge. Compared to direct RL control, the hybrid architecture maintains superior safety characteristics during training while achieving comparable performance with more stable control actions.

</details>


### [470] [Integrated Lander-Propulsion-GNC Framework for Autonomous Lunar Powered Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23013)
*Emre Aklan,Fatih Seker,Bekir Gencalioglu,Mehmet Batuhan Kaya,Yigit Serceoglu,Furkan Yavuz,Omer Burak Iskender,Burak Yaglioglu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文为自主月球动力下降提出了一种集成的着陆器-推进-GNC框架。以BUG VTVL测试车辆为参考平台，结合YUNT V0可调双组元发动机和实时逐次凸化制导求解器，通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证了亚50米着陆精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有月球着陆制导框架未能充分考虑推进系统与结构、制导与控制间的耦合，导致传统方法在处理非凸约束（如推力下限、质量耦合、死区）时实时性不足。

Method: 采用逐次凸化算法将所有非凸约束（推力下限、质量耦合、推进器死区）统一转化为二阶锥规划问题，实现近实时求解。

Result: 参数分析揭示了推力比、指向能力和表面重力之间的基本耦合。蒙特卡洛模拟显示在现实扰动下着陆精度低于50米。

Conclusion: 该集成框架证明可有效应对推进约束和状态耦合，为自主月球动力下降提供实时鲁棒制导方案。

Abstract: This paper presents an integrated lander-propulsion-GNC framework for autonomous lunar powered descent. The BUG VTVL test vehicle serves as the reference platform, with the YUNT V0 throttleable bipropellant engine providing variable thrust across a wide operating envelope, integrated with a real-time successive convexification guidance solver. The vehicle design accounts for structural configuration, landing stability, center-of-mass migration, and inertia evolution, while the propulsion architecture defines the throttle ratio, dead-zone behavior, and gimbal authority that constrain the guidance problem. A successive convexification algorithm addresses all nonconvexities; thrust lower bounds, mass depletion coupling, and thruster dead-zone behavior are all handled within a unified second-order cone program solvable in near-real time. Parametric analysis reveals a fundamental coupling between throttle ratio, pointing authority, and surface gravity. Monte Carlo simulations validate guidance robustness, achieving sub-50-meter landing precision under realistic perturbations.

</details>


### [471] [Learning the Weather-Grid Nexus via Weather-to-Voltage (W2V) Predictive Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23070)
*Sol Lim,Min-Seung Ko,Farnaz Safdarian,Hao Zhu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出天气-电压(W2V)预测框架，实现天气与电网状态的联合分析，并用于电网感知天气预测(GAWF)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有天气感知电网运行方法无法实现天气与电网状态的联合分析，需要端到端学习框架。

Method: W2V模型作为可微分替代，将高分辨率天气特征映射到全网母线电压，采用紧凑神经网络和PCA初始化。

Result: 在6717节点系统上验证了高精度和泛化性，GAWF能有效优先预测关键天气特征（如快速风降）。

Conclusion: W2V模型成功耦合天气与电网，显著提升关键天气事件的预测优先级。

Abstract: This paper proposes a weather-to-voltage (W2V) predictive modeling framework to learn the underlying weather-grid nexus. Unlike existing approaches on weather-informed grid operations, our proposed W2V model can achieve the joint analysis of weather and grid states, and further leverage this coupling to enhance grid-aware weather forecasting (GAWF) as a key application. To achieve this end-to-end learning, the W2V model acts as a differentiable surrogate for weather-incorporated power flow analysis by mapping weather features at high spatial resolution directly to grid-wide bus voltages. Thanks to a compact neural network design and principal component analysis based initialization, it achieves high voltage prediction accuracy and numerical stability during training. Building on this capability, W2V-based voltage signals are used to guide the development of GAWF that can account for its downstream voltage prediction performance. Using a 6717-bus Texas synthetic test system with meteorological inputs from 701 weather locations, our numerical tests have verified the excellent accuracy and generalizability of the proposed W2V model. More importantly, the W2V model has enabled the GAWF to effectively prioritize the weather features and conditions that are most critical to grid operations, such as system-wide quick wind drops preceding ramp-ups.

</details>


### [472] [System-Level Impacts of Flexible Data Center Load Scheduling on Cost, Emissions, and Transmission Congestion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23128)
*Akibul Hasan Mazumder,Yuanrui Sang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 研究了灵活的数据中心负载调度对电力系统运营成本、压力和排放的影响，发现在不损害服务质量的前提下，可降低运行成本和排放并缓解输电拥堵。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型数据中心在美国快速部署，带来了大量灵活负载潜力，但灵活调度对电力系统的系统级影响尚未充分探索。

Method: 使用ACTIVSg2000 2000节点测试系统，模拟灵活与非灵活调度场景，分析负载转移、LMP、排放和拥堵变化。

Result: 尽力而为负载向低LMP时段（常与高可再生能源出力一致）转移；延迟敏感负载不受影响；温室气体、有毒排放和输电拥堵均减少。

Conclusion: 灵活调度可支持更高效和可持续的电网运行，在保持服务质量的同时降低成本和环境影响。

Abstract: Large data centers are being deployed in the U.S. at an unprecedented rate, introducing significant flexible load potential. A portion of data center workloads - best-effort (BE) jobs - can be scheduled flexibly to reduce power system operating costs and emissions. However, the system-level impacts of such scheduling remain underexplored. This paper investigates the effects of flexible data center load scheduling on operating cost, system stress, and emissions using the ACTIVSg2000 2000-bus test system. Results show that BE loads shift toward periods of lower locational marginal prices (LMPs), typically aligned with high renewable generation. Importantly, latency-critical (LC) workloads remain unaffected, preserving quality of service (QoS). Flexible scheduling also leads to reductions in both greenhouse gas and toxic emissions, as well as transmission congestion, compared to inflexible operation, demonstrating its potential to support more efficient and sustainable grid operation.

</details>


### [473] [An Algebraic State Observer for a Class of Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23142)
*Alexey Bobtsov,Jose Guadalupe Romero,Romeo Ortega,Anton Pyrkin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于代数关系的新型非线性系统状态观测器设计方法，无需观測性或激励条件，适用于具有可测导数状态分量的物理系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统渐近观测器依赖收敛性条件且设计复杂，本文旨在通过代数方法实现实时无误差状态估计，突破经典框架的限制。

Method: 利用状态分量可测导数的假设，通过交换引理消除动力学中的导数项，并用可测信号替换，最终建立输入-输出滤波信号之间的代数关系。

Result: 成功构建代数观测器，无需观測性或激励条件，在电机和机械系统等经典案例中展现了非渐近的精确估计能力。

Conclusion: 代数观测器为非线性系统状态估计提供了全新思路，尤其适合物理系统，且避免了传统方法的收敛性和激振条件限制。

Abstract: In this paper we present a radically new approach to design state observers for nonlinear systems, with particular emphasis on physical ones. Our objective is to obtain an algebraic relation between the unmeasurable part of the state and filtered versions of the systems inputs and outputs, which holds true for all $t \geq 0$. The latter qualifier should be contrasted with the usual asymptotic (or fixed/finite time) objective. The standing assumption for our design is the availability -- or possibility of constructing, via coordinate change -- state components with measurable derivatives. In the physical systems studied in the paper this condition is naturally satisfied. The next step in the design is the application of the Swapping Lemma to pull out from the dynamics the derivative of one of these signals. The design is completed replacing the latter by the measurable signals and arranging the remaining terms. The algebraic observer constitutes a refreshing major departure from classical asymptotic observer designs, even in the case of electrical motors and mechanical systems that have been exhaustively studied. Particularly notable is the fact that no observability or excitation condition is imposed for the construction of the algebraic observer.

</details>


### [474] [GPU-Native Multi-Area State Estimation via SIMD Abstraction and Boundary Condensation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23175)
*Yifei Xu,Yuzhang Lin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种GPU原生框架，通过SIMD抽象和稀疏Schur局部凝聚实现分层多区域状态估计，解决了大规模电网状态估计的计算瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统集中式状态估计器在面对系统规模扩大和实时性要求增加时，计算压力增大，需要开发更高效的并行计算方案。

Method: 将网络分区，使用固定稀疏模板评估测量残差和导数，通过融合GPU累积核直接组装局部正则方程块，在GPU上以Schur模式分解每个区域，导出边界块并求解简化全局边界系统。

Result: 在PEGASE 2869节点、9241节点和ACTIVSg10k基准系统上的实验表明，该方法通过保持完整设备驻留和高算术强度，有效利用了GPU吞吐量。

Conclusion: 该GPU原生分层多区域状态估计框架能够提高计算效率，适用于大规模电网实时监测。

Abstract: Power system state estimation (SE) is foundational for grid monitoring, yet conventional centralized solvers face increasing computational pressure as the system scale and real-time requirements grow. This paper presents a GPU-native framework for hierarchical multi-area state estimation (MASE) that addresses these bottlenecks through a single-instruction, multiple-data (SIMD) abstraction and sparse Schur local condensation. We partition the network into areas, evaluate measurement residuals and derivatives using fixed-sparsity templates, and directly assemble local normal-equation blocks through a fused GPU accumulation kernel without materializing explicit Jacobians. Each area is then factorized on the GPU in Schur mode to export a dense local boundary block and condensed right-hand side, after which a reduced global boundary system is assembled and solved on device. This design preserves device residency across measurement evaluation, local condensation, and boundary coordination while exposing parallelism across areas. Numerical experiments on partitioned PEGASE 2869-bus, PEGASE 9241-bus, and ACTIVSg10k benchmark systems demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively leverages GPU throughput by maintaining full device residency and high arithmetic intensity.

</details>


### [475] [An Exponentially stable Extended Kalman Filter with Estimate dependent Process noise Covariance for Chemical Reaction Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23182)
*Suryasnata Dash,Abhishek Dey*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于化学朗之万方程的扩展卡尔曼滤波器，其过程噪声协方差依赖于状态估计，并分析了其随机稳定性，在非线性基因表达模型上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物分子系统中的固有噪声来自反应动力学，传统卡尔曼滤波假设恒定的过程噪声协方差并依赖启发式调参，这在实际中不适用。

Method: 基于化学朗之万方程构建状态估计依赖的过程噪声协方差的扩展卡尔曼滤波器，并推导了离散时间系统下估计误差均方指数有界的采样周期上界。

Result: 仿真表明，该方法在非线性基因表达模型中有效，无需启发式调参即可实现状态和参数估计。

Conclusion: 该框架为合成生物分子电路提供了基于第一性原理的建模和滤波器设计方法，消除了对过程噪声协方差的启发式调整。

Abstract: Biomolecular systems are often modeled with partially known nonlinear stochastic dynamics, making state and parameter estimation a central challenge. While Kalman filtering techniques are widely used in this setting, their performance critically depends on the choice of the process noise covariance, which is typically assumed constant and heuristically tuned. Such assumptions are not justified for biomolecular systems, where intrinsic noise arises from underlying reaction kinetics. In this work, we propose an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) with a state estimate-dependent process noise covariance based on Chemical Langevin Equation (CLE). Further, we analyze the stochastic stability of the proposed filter and derive conditions under which the estimation error remains exponentially bounded in the mean-square sense. In particular, we obtain an upper bound on the sampling period for discrete-time biomolecular systems that guarantees this property. The proposed framework is validated through simulations on a nonlinear gene expression model. This approach enables first principle-based modeling and filter design choices for synthetic biomolecular circuits, eliminating the need for heuristic tuning of the process noise covariance.

</details>


### [476] [Adaptive Spatial-Temporal Graph Learning-Enabled Short-Term Voltage Stability Assessment against Time-Varying Topological Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23204)
*Chao Deng,Lipeng Zhu,Chang Liu,Hefeng Zhai,Baoye Tian,Zexiang Zhu,Jiayong Li,Cong Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应时空图学习驱动的短时电压稳定性评估方法，通过自适应图表示矩阵和注意力机制应对电网拓扑变化，实验证明有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于深度学习的SVS评估方法未充分考虑电网拓扑时变特性，导致实际应用中性能严重下降。

Method: 自适应图表示矩阵学习空间相关性，空间注意力机制调整矩阵，基于注意力图表示构建残差时空图卷积网络，并用Optuna优化。

Result: 在中国南方实际电网两个子系统的测试中，该方法在各种拓扑变化条件下表现有效。

Conclusion: 该方法能够适应电网拓扑变化，实现有效的短时电压稳定性评估。

Abstract: The emerging deep learning (DL) technology has recently exhibited great potential in data-driven short-term voltage stability (SVS) assessment of complex power grids. However, without sufficient attention to the time-varying topological structures of today's power grids, the majority of existing DL-based SVS assessment schemes could experience severe performance degradation in practice. To address this drawback, this paper proposes an adaptive spatial-temporal graph learning-enabled SVS assessment approach that can adapt well to various topological changes. First, considering the time-varying topological conditions of a given power grid, an adaptive graph representation matrix is automatically learned to effectively capture the complicated spatial correlations between individual buses within the grid. Then, to help better capture regional SVS features for subsequent learning processes, the adaptive graph representation matrix is properly adjusted by introducing a spatial attention mechanism. Further, with post-fault system trajectory data linked together via attention-based graph representation, a residual spatiotemporal graph convolutional network is carefully built with Optuna-based optimization to deeply mine system-wide spatiotemporal features and thus achieve structure-adaptive SVS assessment. Numerical test results on two representative sub-systems of a realistic provincial power grid in South China demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach under various changing topological conditions.

</details>


### [477] [sumoITScontrol: Traffic Controller Collection for SUMO Traffic Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23240)
*Kevin Riehl,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出开源框架sumoITScontrol，集成标准交通控制器实现与可重复性评估方法，提升微观仿真基准测试的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交通控制研究缺乏可重复性与可比性，常采用单次运行评估和专用基线实现。

Method: 基于SUMO和TraCI接口，集成Max Pressure、SCOOT/SCATS、ALINEA等控制器，强调校准与复制实验的统计验证。

Result: 随机变异显著影响性能指标，需采用方差感知报告和统计假设检验。

Conclusion: sumoITScontrol通过标准化实现与评估指南，促进方法透明度和公平基准测试。

Abstract: Reliable benchmarking is essential for progress in intelligent traffic control research. While microscopic traffic simulators such as SUMO enable detailed modelling of individual vehicle interactions, many published control studies still rely on single-run evaluations and project-specific baseline implementations, limiting reproducibility and comparability. This paper presents sumoITScontrol, an open-source and extensible Python framework providing a curated collection of widely used traffic controllers implemented for SUMO via the TraCI interface. The framework includes established methods for both urban and freeway traffic management, such as Max Pressure signal control, SCOOT/SCATS-inspired adaptive strategies, and ramp metering algorithms including ALINEA, HERO, and METALINE. Beyond providing implementations, the paper emphasises methodological best-practices for controller evaluation in stochastic microscopic environments. Through systematic calibration and replicated simulation experiments, we demonstrate the substantial impact of stochastic variability on performance metrics and highlight the necessity of variance-aware reporting and statistical hypothesis testing. By combining standardised controller implementations with reproducibility-oriented evaluation guidelines, sumoITScontrol aims to improve methodological transparency, enable fair benchmarking of novel approaches, and strengthen experimental standards within the SUMO and intelligent transportation systems research communities. Source Code on project's GitHub page: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/sumoITScontrol/.

</details>


### [478] [Robust Operation of Distribution Networks: Generalized Uncertainty Modelling in Confidence-Level-Based Information Gap Decision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23252)
*Zhisheng Xiong,Dimitris Boskos,Bo Zeng,Peter Palensky,Pedro P. Vergara*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于置信水平的信息间隙决策理论（CL-IGDT）框架，用于配电网在可再生能源和负荷不确定性下的鲁棒优化运行，通过广义不确定性建模和改进的求解算法（斐波那契参数列与约束生成法），实现了鲁棒性与经济性的更好权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有配电网鲁棒优化方法在刻画不确定性时表达能力有限，且难以兼顾鲁棒性和经济性能，亟需更灵活的建模和高效求解方法。

Method: 基于信息间隙决策理论（IGDT）提出广义不确定性建模（支持对称/非对称及线性/非线性扩展），构建CL-IGDT框架；通过等价转化为两阶段鲁棒优化问题（TSRO），并设计斐波那契-参数列与约束生成算法（含切循环复用策略）。

Result: 算例验证表明，所提框架可灵活调节鲁棒性-经济性权衡，提出的算法在保证渐近收敛的同时显著提升计算效率。

Conclusion: CL-IGDT框架能有效处理配电网不确定性，所提算法在效率和收敛性上具有优势，为实际运行提供了新方案。

Abstract: This paper studies the robust optimal operation of distribution networks (DNs) under renewable generation and load demand uncertainties, seeking an improved trade-off between robustness and economic performance. Building upon information gap decision theory (IGDT), a generalized uncertainty modelling is proposed to enhance the expressiveness of the uncertainty characterization. The proposed modelling captures both symmetric and asymmetric uncertainty features, and supports linear or nonlinear expansion of the uncertainty sets driven by confidence level. This advancement leads to the development of a confidence-level-based IGDT (CL-IGDT) framework for DN operation. To solve the resulting model, its equivalence to a family of two-stage robust optimization problems (TSROs) is established, enabling a Fibonacci search over the confidence level. To further improve computational efficiency, a cut-recycling strategy is proposed to exploit invariant information across TSROs. These techniques are integrated into a novel Fibonacci-Parametric Column-and-Constraint Generation algorithm with guaranteed asymptotic convergence. Case studies validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and demonstrate the performance advantages of the proposed algorithm.

</details>


### [479] [Private and Common Information States in Decentralized Parallel Dynamic Programming for Delayed Sharing Patterns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23439)
*Charalambos D. Charalambous,Umarbek Guvercin,Seddik Djouadi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文针对具有延迟共享信息模式的分散式随机最优控制问题，提出了一种动态规划方法，该方法继承了集中式部分可观测马尔可夫决策问题动态规划的基本属性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决自[1]中T步延迟共享模式出现以来的长期未解决问题，即如何将经典动态规划的基本属性推广到分散式控制场景。

Method: 利用Person-by-Person最优性概念，结合分离策略结构，定义基于私人后验概率和共享后验概率的信息状态，并推导出广义和简化的动态规划方程。

Result: 建立了用于PbP最优性的充要条件，并证明了最优策略可分离为两个信息状态的函数，各自满足马尔可夫递归。

Conclusion: 该动态规划方法成功将经典动态规划的基本属性推广至延迟共享信息模式的分散式控制问题，填补了理论空白。

Abstract: This paper develops a dynamic programming (DP) approach for decentralized stochastic optimal control problems with delayed sharing information patterns, which exhibits the fundamental Properties of classical DP of centralized partially observable Markov decision problems (POMDPs): the value functions and information states depend on the actions of the minimizing controls and not their strategies. This is achieved by invoking the concept of Person-by-Person (PbP) optimality, in which each control strategy is associated with a value function conditioned on its assigned delayed sharing information pattern, when all other strategies are fixed to their optimal responses. The value functions satisfy generalized and simplified DP equations. These are used to derive necessary and sufficient conditions for PbP optimality. The simplified DP equations are obtained by invoking the structural property that optimal strategies are separated and functionals of two information states: 1) a private a posteriori probability distribution based on the information pattern of the strategy, and 2) a centralized a posteriori probability distribution based on the shared or common information to all strategies, each satisfying a Markov recursion. The DP approach of this paper, settles a long standing open problem since the appearance of T-step delayed sharing patterns in [1, Section IV.G], in terms of generalizing the fundamental properties of classical DP approach.

</details>


### [480] [Resource-Constrained Shortest Path with Polytopic Reset Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23480)
*Khaled Surur,Melkior Ornik*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了资源受限环境下经过补给区域的最短路径问题，提出了一种基于图搜索和凸优化的两阶段求解方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法无法高效处理路径长度受预算限制且可通过多面体补给区域恢复预算的连续最优路径问题。

Method: 先使用波前算法生成离散节点图，通过最短路径算法确定最优多面体序列；再利用凸优化在该序列中精确求解连续最优路径。

Result: 数值实验验证了该方法在预算恢复区域下的有效性，能获得近乎最优的路径。

Conclusion: 该方法为资源约束下的最短路径问题提供了可实现的求解框架。

Abstract: This paper investigates the problem of computing the shortest path between two states under resource constraints in environments with resource-replenishment regions. Namely, the length of the path is limited by a budget that can be restored within polytopic replenishment regions. We show that the optimal path in this problem exhibits a distinct geometric structure: it consists of straight-line segments, changes direction at replenishment regions, and visits regions at most once. We propose an approach to solve the continuous problem in two steps: using a graph-based approach, followed by convex programming. First, we define a graph whose nodes are possible waypoints of feasible paths, and the edges are the Euclidean distances between these nodes. To obtain a discrete set of nodes that ensure a feasible and near-optimal solution, we utilize a wavefront algorithm. With a sufficiently small spacing between wavefronts, the solution of the shortest path problem on this graph yields the optimal sequence of polytopes to visit. Next, we use convex optimization on this sequence of polytopes to find the exact optimal path. A numerical experiment is presented to demonstrate the effectiveness of the approach. This approach provides a framework for solving the resource-constrained shortest path with budget reset.

</details>


### [481] [Physics-Aware LLM-Based Probabilistic Wind Power Scenario Generation under Extreme Icing Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23524)
*Lei Wang,Ying Zhang,Di Shi,Fei Ding*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种物理感知的大语言模型框架，用于在极端覆冰条件下生成概率风电场景，结合SCADA物理建模、多模态分词和因果Transformer，提高了物理一致性和保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确描述覆冰和灾后条件下的风电不确定性对弹性电力系统运行至关重要，现有方法难以应对这一挑战。

Method: 集成基于SCADA的物理建模、多模态分词、自回归因果Transformer，以及物理感知解码方案（强制额定功率和爬坡约束）。

Result: 使用真实风机数据验证，该方法能够复现覆冰导致的功率降级和时间变化，生成的场景物理一致且高保真。

Conclusion: 显著提升了可再生能源集成电力系统的弹性评估和恢复规划能力。

Abstract: Accurately characterizing wind power uncertainty under icing and post-disaster conditions remains a critical challenge for resilient power system operation. To address this issue, this paper proposes a physics-aware large language model (LLM) framework for probabilistic wind power scenario generation under extreme icing conditions. The proposed framework integrates supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA)-based physical modeling, multimodal tokenization, and a causal Transformer architecture trained in an autoregressive manner. A physics-aware decoding scheme effectively enforces rated power limits and ramping constraints on the generated trajectories while preserving stochastic diversity. Case studies using real wind turbine data show that the proposed method reproduces icing-induced power degradation and temporal variability observed during extreme weather. The resulting scenarios are physically consistent and high-fidelity, thereby significantly enhancing resilience assessment and recovery planning in renewable-integrated power systems.

</details>


### [482] [Dynamic-Key Post-Quantum Encrypted Control Against System Identification Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23564)
*Jungjin Park,Kiminao Kogiso*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于动态密钥学习误差的加密控制系统，通过密钥和密文同步更新抵御系统辨识攻击，并给出了参数设计条件与数值验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态密钥加密控制易受系统辨识攻击，需要发展动态密钥方案。

Method: 在LWE框架中构建同时更新私钥和密文的更新映射，分析同态操作误差增长，基于安全指标设计参数。

Result: 数值例子表明所提系统能有效抵抗系统辨识攻击。

Conclusion: 动态密钥LWE加密控制可有效提升安全性，且参数条件保障正确解密。

Abstract: This study proposes post-quantum encrypted control systems based on dynamic-key Learning with Errors (LWE) encryption schemes. The proposed method develops update maps that simultaneously update the private key and ciphertexts within the LWE framework, enabling dynamic-key encrypted control resistant to system identification attacks. The growth of errors induced by homomorphic operations is analyzed, and sufficient parameter conditions guaranteeing correct decryption at each control step are clarified. Furthermore, a design procedure for the encrypted control systems is presented based on security metrics such as sample-identifying complexity and deciphering time. A numerical example demonstrates that the proposed control systems achieve secure control against the considered system identification attack.

</details>


### [483] [Unified Energy Function Tailored to Inverter-Based Resources with PI Controllers for Transient Stability Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23697)
*Yifan Zhang,Hsiao-Dong Chiang,Yitong Li,Yang Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 针对逆变器比例积分控制器提出统一能量函数，实现更精准的暂态稳定吸引域估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统能量函数不适用于含PI控制器的逆变器系统，需要开发专属能量函数以准确分析其暂态稳定特性。

Method: 基于PI控制器特性，推导统一形式的能量函数，应用于跟网型逆变器和直流电压控制构网型逆变器。

Result: 所提能量函数对吸引域估计更紧凑（保守性更低）且有效，经硬件在环实验验证。

Conclusion: 该能量函数为含PI控制器的逆变器系统提供了统一的暂态稳定分析工具，优于传统方法。

Abstract: The increasing penetration of inverter-based resources (IBRs) has fundamentally altered the transient stability characteristics of modern power systems. IBRs typically rely on proportional--integral (PI) controllers for synchronization and regulation, resulting in nonlinear swing equations that differ significantly from those of synchronous generators (SGs) and exhibit state-dependent damping. Consequently, although the classical energy function is often adopted in IBR analysis by analogy with SGs, it cannot be directly applied to IBRs with PI controller. A new energy function explicitly tailored to PI controller is proposed in this letter. It admits a unified form and can be applied to a class of nonlinear systems with PI controllers. Two representative cases are considered, including a grid-following (GFL) inverter and a DC-voltage-controlled grid-forming (GFM) inverter, demonstrating less conservative and more effective estimation of the region of attraction (ROA). All findings are verified through hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) experiments.

</details>


### [484] [Defining the Magnetization State of LCF Magnets: From Material Properties to Motor-Level Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23707)
*Taha El Hajji,Aleksandr Nadkin,Stefan Skoog,Lars Sjöberg,Kristoffer Nilsson,Anthony C. Morcos*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了四种磁化状态定义，并评估了它们在材料与电机层面的关系，为变磁通电机提供统一的MS度量框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要统一方法定义和比较变磁通存储电机的磁化状态，以支持材料分析、控制实现和状态监测。

Method: 基于LCF磁体的固有属性（B、J）和电机层面量（基波磁链、反电动势），在id-iq平面通过有限元分析评估。

Result: 明确了材料级行为与可测电机量之间的关联，并展示了不同定义在混合磁体配置下的适用性。

Conclusion: 该框架能为不同应用目标（材料分析、控制、监测）选择合适的MS度量提供指导。

Abstract: Variable flux memory motors, which employ Low Coercive Force (LCF) magnets, achieve extended high-efficiency operation through controllable magnetization states. To address the need for a unified approach to defining and comparing the magnetization state (MS) across material and motor levels, this paper proposes four MS definitions: two based on intrinsic material properties-magnetic flux density B and magnetic polarization J-and two based on motor-level quantities-fundamental flux linkage and back-EMF components. These definitions are evaluated across the id, iq operating plane using finite element analysis on an interior PMSM with a hybrid magnet configuration (LCF and HCF: High Coercive Force) and a defined circuit setup. The results clarify the relationship between material-level behavior and measurable motor quantities. The proposed framework provides guidance for selecting appropriate MS metrics depending on the application objective, whether for material analysis, control implementation, or condition monitoring in variable flux machines.

</details>


### [485] [An Individual-Delay-Reflected Generalized Consensus Analysis for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous Time-Varying Delays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23723)
*Hye Jin Lee,Ho Sub Lee,PooGyeon Park*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种针对异构时变时延的多智能体系统广义一致性准则，通过构造新的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函和零等式条件降低保守性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究通常假设所有智能体具有均匀时延，忽略了实际通信环境中各智能体时延的异构性，导致保守性过高。

Method: 构建分段积分Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函以反映异构时延，引入零等式条件降低保守性，采用N依赖广义积分不等式平衡计算复杂度。

Result: 数值算例验证了所提准则相比传统方法具有更低的保守性。

Conclusion: 该准则有效降低了异构时延系统的保守性，并提供了计算复杂度可调的灵活性。

Abstract: In multi-agent systems, heterogeneous time delays exist for all agents because of the difference in communication environments. Therefore, the consensus analysis of a system considering a homogeneous time-varying delay among all agents results in conservatism. In this study, an individual-delay-reflected generalized consensus is proposed for multi-agent systems with heterogeneous time-varying delays with various bounds. To reflect heterogeneous time-varying delays, the proposed Lyapunov-Krasovskii functional is constructed by dividing the integral term into intervals containing heterogeneous delays and considering augmented vectors with delay states and integral states. Furthermore, by adding zero equality conditions, conservatism is reduced. N-dependent generalized integral inequality is used to allow the user to adjust the computational complexity. Numerical examples demonstrate a reduction in conservatism with the proposed consensus criterion.

</details>


### [486] [On the Generalization Properties of Selective State-Space Models for Filtering Tasks for Unknown Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23818)
*Alex Tang,M. Emrullah Ildiz,Batin Kurt,Samet Oymak,Necmiye Ozay*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 论文研究了结构化状态空间模型（如Mamba）在未知系统滤波任务中的在线预测能力，并进行了理论泛化性分析和数值实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索SSM能否像Transformer一样通过上下文学习完成未知系统的滤波和输出预测任务。

Method: 在多个系统轨迹样本上训练SSM，运行时根据未知系统历史输出在线预测下一输出；同时推导泛化界进行理论分析。

Result: SSM在该任务上表现良好，数值实验验证了其有效性，并与Transformer进行了优劣势对比。

Conclusion: 结构化SSM可有效用于未知系统的在线滤波预测，且具备理论保障，但在某些方面与Transformer存在差异。

Abstract: Selective State-Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba have emerged as an alternative architecture to self-attention based transformers in sequence modeling tasks. Recent works have demonstrated the use of transformers in some filtering and output prediction tasks via in-context learning. In this paper, we analyze whether structured SSMs can work equally well for filtering of unknown systems. In particular, we train the SSM on trajectory samples from a set of systems. At run-time, the SSM is given the outputs of an unknown system from the same set and is expected to predict the next output online. Theoretically, under appropriate assumptions, we derive generalization bounds as to why SSMs succeed in such tasks. Empirically, we demonstrate the performance via several numerical examples. We also discuss the advantages and disadvantages of SSMs versus transformers for this task.

</details>


### [487] [VLM-VPI: A Vision-Language Reasoning Framework for Improving Automated Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23934)
*Qingwen Pu,Kun Xie,Yuxiang Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉-语言模型的自动驾驶行人意图理解框架，在仿真和真实场景中提升意图识别准确率、降低误警率并增强安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统仅依赖几何与运动学线索推断行人行为，难以理解视觉场景上下文及年龄相关的行为差异，导致安全干预延迟或不必要刹车。

Method: 构建VLM-VPI框架，包含多模态感知层、基于Qwen3-VL和GPT-OSS的推理层，以及按年龄（儿童/成人/老人）定制刹车间距的分层安全控制器。

Result: 在112个CARLA场景中意图分类准确率达92.3%，误警率从7.4%降至2.8%，冲突数减少73.4%，最小碰撞时间提升至4.47秒。年龄自适应控制使儿童和老人冲突分别减少60%和54.5%。

Conclusion: 显式的视觉-语言推理层通过链接行人意图、人口统计背景和车辆控制决策，能够同时提升自动驾驶的安全性和效率。

Abstract: Autonomous driving systems often infer pedestrian yielding behavior from geometric and kinematic cues alone, limiting their ability to reason about visual scene context and age-dependent behavioral variability. This limitation can produce delayed interventions in safety-critical encounters and unnecessary braking in benign interactions. This work introduces Vision-Language Model-based Vehicle-Pedestrian Interaction (VLM-VPI), a multimodal reasoning framework for pedestrian intent understanding and yielding-aware control in autonomous driving. The system combines three components: a multimodal perception layer that captures visual and kinematic observations, a reasoning layer that uses Qwen3-VL 8B for visual scene understanding and GPT-OSS 20B for few-shot intent reasoning, and a tiered safety controller that applies age-specific braking margins for children, adults, and seniors. In 112 CARLA scenarios, VLM-VPI achieves 92.3% intent classification accuracy, outperforming a rule-based baseline (78.4%), supervised trajectory models (73.5-82.4%), and a zero-shot LLM configuration (88.4%). Validation on 24 real-world PIE scenarios yields 87.5% accuracy, indicating functional sim-to-real transferability. Across 200 simulation cases, VLM-VPI reduces the false-alarm rate from 7.4% to 2.8% and mean intersection traversal time from 13.5 s to 11.8 s. Conflict occurrences decrease from 124 to 33, while mean minimum time-to-collision improves from 1.92 s to 4.47 s. Demographic-adaptive control further reduces conflicts by 60% for children and 54.5% for seniors compared with uniform control. These results show that an explicit vision-language reasoning layer can improve both safety and efficiency by linking pedestrian intent, demographic context, and vehicle control decisions.

</details>


### [488] [Extracting Exact Lie Derivatives Without Backpropagation: A Dual Compiler for Neural Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23995)
*Mohammadreza Kamaldar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种双代数编译器，通过前向网络评估即可精确提取神经网络的障碍函数值及其李导数，无需反向模式自动微分，并支持在微控制器上实现亚毫秒级安全滤波。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 嵌入式安全关键系统需要实时计算神经网络的障碍函数值及其李导数，但传统反向模式自动微分会创建动态图，导致内存开销大且难以进行最坏执行时间分析。

Method: 将系统状态编码为对偶数的实部、目标向量场编码为对偶部，证明仿射层和逐分量激活层可扩展为对偶形式，精确传播方向导数；采用超双数算术扩展到二阶李导数。

Result: 消除了动态图分配，浮点运算次数和峰值内存有闭式表达式；在ESP32-S3上编译成自包含C++代码，零动态内存分配，单周期<1ms，支持千赫兹安全滤波。

Conclusion: 该编译器能够在资源受限的嵌入式硬件上高效、可预测地执行神经网络的CBF安全约束，适合安全关键实时控制。

Abstract: Deploying neural-network control barrier functions (CBFs) on embedded hardware requires evaluating the barrier value and its Lie derivatives along the system vector fields at every control cycle. The standard mechanism for exact gradient extraction, reverse-mode automatic differentiation, constructs a dynamic computational graph whose memory footprint grows with network depth and whose backward traversal obstructs the worst-case execution time analysis required for safety-critical certification. This paper presents a dual-algebraic compiler that extracts the exact barrier value and its Lie derivatives through forward network evaluation alone. Encoding the system state as the real part of a dual number and a target vector field as the dual part, we prove that every affine and componentwise-activation layer admits a dual extension that propagates the exact directional derivative alongside the activation, and that the composed dual-extended network evaluates the exact Jacobian--vector-field product with zero truncation error. We derive closed-form expressions for the dual-pass floating-point operation count and peak memory footprint, prove that the proposed algorithm eliminates dynamic graph allocation, and extend the framework to the second-order Lie derivatives required by relative-degree-two CBFs using hyper-dual arithmetic. An open-source ahead-of-time compiler translates trained neural CBFs into self-contained C++ headers that assemble the complete safety constraint on an ESP32-S3 microcontroller from a statically allocated buffer, with zero dynamic memory allocation and a sub-millisecond cycle budget that supports kilohertz-rate safety filters.

</details>


### [489] [Safe Reconnection Time for Large-Scale Data Center Loads: An Analytical Framework for Transient Stability Assessment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24009)
*Ahmed Mesfer Alkhudaydi,Bai Cui*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个分析框架，用于确定大型数据中心负载在扰动断开后的安全重新连接时间，以避免引发振荡和重复连接断开（flapping）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型电力电子密集型数据中心负载的快速增长给电网带来操作挑战，尤其是在UPS断开后不当的重新连接会加剧机电振荡和频率偏差。

Method: 基于单机无穷大系统模型，捕捉断开期间的摆动动力学和负载母线的电压-角度耦合，利用能量函数方法分析关键安全重新连接时间。

Result: 确定了临界安全重新连接时间，超过该时间后重新连接能保证轨迹在运行限制内并收敛到新平衡点，避免flapping。时域仿真验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提供了基于物理的简单判据，可用于约束大型数据中心负载的重新连接窗口，指导UPS重新连接逻辑。

Abstract: The rapid growth of large, power-electronics-rich data center (DC) loads is creating new operational challenges for bulk power systems. A key risk arises when a DC uninterruptible power supply (UPS) disconnects the facility during voltage/frequency disturbances and then reconnects it while the bulk grid is still dynamically settling to a new equilibrium point. Poorly timed reconnection can amplify electromechanical oscillations, deepen frequency deviations, and lead to repeated connect-disconnect \emph{flapping}. In this paper, we develop an analytical framework to characterize the \emph{safe reconnection time} for large DC loads after a disturbance-induced disconnection that avoids flapping. Using a model in the spirit of the classical single-machine infinite-bus system, we capture (i) swing dynamics during the disconnection interval and (ii) voltage-angle coupling at the load bus, which determines the electrical power step at reconnection under constant-power load assumptions. Using energy function method, we characterize the critical safe reconnection time such that for any reconnection time after the critical safe reconnection time, the post-reconnection trajectory is guaranteed to remain within operational limits (frequency/angle/voltage) and converge to the post-reconnection equilibrium, thereby preventing flapping. Time-domain simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed analytical approach. The results provide a simple, physics-informed criterion that can be used to bound reconnection windows for large DC facilities and inform UPS reconnection logic.

</details>


### [490] [A Road-Mobile GNSS-Disciplined Oscillator for Accurate Synchronization of Vehicular Microwave Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24060)
*Maximilian Engelhardt,Carsten Andrich,Daniel Stanko,Alexander Ihlow,Markus Landmann*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种为移动场景优化的新型GNSS驯服时钟，在真实驾驶测试中最大偏差仅22.6纳秒，远优于现有设备。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全球导航卫星系统驯服振荡器针对静态环境设计，在移动场景下精度不足。

Method: 采用对动态加速度低敏感的恒温晶体振荡器，结合先进GNSS授时模块进行驯服。

Result: 真实路测中，现有设备最大偏差2315纳秒，而新方案始终不超过22.6纳秒。

Conclusion: 新方案显著提升了移动场景下的同步精度。

Abstract: Precise synchronization is essential in various technical disciplines, being especially challenging in mobile scenarios. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art global navigation satellite system (GNSS) disciplined oscillators (GNSSDOs) are designed and optimized for stationary operation. We present a novel solution that is optimized for mobile use from the ground up. The centerpiece is a precise oven-controlled crystal oscillator (OCXO) that is optimized for low sensitivity to dynamic accelerations. A state-of-the-art GNSS timing module is used to discipline it. We evaluate the system by comparing it with state-of-the-art test equipment in a real-world test drive through diverse environments. After compensating for the stationary offset, the state-of-the-art devices deviated by up to 2315 ns, while with our devices, the deviation never exceeded 22.6 ns. It is evident that the devices designed for laboratory use perform inadequately in mobile operation and that our novel solution enables a significant leap in accuracy.

</details>


### [491] [Optimal Planning and Control under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24107)
*Zuodong Pan,Xu Fang,Wei Ren*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于非线性系统在信号时序逻辑（STL）规范下的规划与控制方法，通过分解任务、采样生成局部路径、局部到全局合成、安全走廊构建和优化求解，最终得到满足STL任务的位置轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理非线性系统下的复杂STL任务时存在计算效率或可行性的挑战，亟需一种高效且可分解的策略。

Method: 任务分解为局部任务；基于采样的方法生成局部航点序列及满意度对集；通过局部到全局策略合成全局航点；构建安全走廊；利用满意度对集和安全走廊构建优化问题求解位置轨迹。

Result: 数值示例和比较结果验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提方法能有效处理非线性系统在STL规范下的规划与控制问题，具有实用性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: This paper addresses the planning and control problem for nonlinear systems under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We first decompose an STL task into finite local tasks. A sampling-based method generates sequences of local waypoints to satisfy all local tasks, from which the corresponding satisfaction pair sets are derived. Following a local-to-global strategy, all sequences of local waypoints are synthesized into a global one, based on which a safe corridor is then constructed. Leveraging the safe corridor and the satisfaction pair sets, an optimization problem is formulated and solved to derive a position trajectory that satisfies the STL task. Finally, numerical examples and comparative results are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [492] [Graph Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Power System Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24210)
*Hannes M. H. Wolf,Christian A. Hans*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出消息传递图神经常微分方程（MPG-NODE），用于识别具有异构节点动态和边缘耦合的耦合系统，在电力系统电压和频率动态辨识中展示了灵活性和迁移学习能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着能源去中心化，电力系统复杂性增加，基于物理的建模困难；同时可用测量数据增多，促使使用数据驱动方法获得模型。

Method: 在图NODE基础上开发MPG-NODE，融合消息传递机制；引入潜在状态推断、局部节点和边缘嵌入处理异构性，以及自回归方案应对分段常数控制输入。

Result: 在IEEE 9节点系统案例中，MPG-NODE相比单体NODE具有更灵活的框架，支持通过迁移学习以很少或无需重新训练来添加或移除电力线和单元。

Conclusion: MPG-NODE为辨识具有异构动态的耦合系统（如电力系统）提供了有效且可扩展的框架。

Abstract: With the shift towards decentralized energy generation, the increasing complexity of power systems renders physics-based modeling challenging. At the same time the growing amount of available measurement data opens the door for obtaining models in a data-driven manner. A modern method to do so are neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs), offering a framework for continuous time system identification. Recent extensions, so called graph NODEs impose a structural inductive bias that has the potential to improve generalization of the learned representation. In this work, we employ graph NODEs and extend them with novel ideas to develop message-passing graph NODEs (MPG-NODEs) for identification of coupled systems with heterogeneous node dynamics and edge couplings. This encompasses state-of-the-art machine learning architectures to infer latent representations of unmeasured states from past measurements, local node and edge embeddings to account for heterogeneity as well as an autoregressive scheme to allow for piecewise constant control inputs. We apply MPG-NODEs to identify voltage and frequency dynamics of power systems and compare them to a monolith NODE under identical measurement assumptions. Our case study on the IEEE 9-bus system indicates that the proposed MPG-NODE offers a much more flexible framework with transfer learning options that allow to add or remove powerlines and units with little to no retraining.

</details>


### [493] [Toward Low-Altitude Embodied Intelligence: A Sensing-Communication-Computation-Control Closed-Loop Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24217)
*Jihao Luo,Zesong Fei,Xinyi Wang,Shuntian Tang,Zilong Liu,Yiqing Zhou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文系统探讨了低空具身智能网络，从架构到应用场景，分析了感知、通信、计算与控制闭环的关键技术，并通过无人机案例展示了其协同能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低空经济快速发展促使无人机自主操作需求增加，需整合感知、通信、计算与控制（SC3）实现闭环交互，以在复杂环境中确保及时、有效和安全的响应。

Method: 通过分析LAEI网络的基础架构、关键技术（如信息传输与决策反馈）以及无人机在未知城区执行通信与环境感知任务的案例研究。

Result: 案例表明，协调的SC3能力可支持高效响应操作，并揭示了当前挑战与未来研究方向。

Conclusion: 该研究为下一代低空智能系统的开发奠定了基础，强调了闭环集成在复杂环境中的重要性。

Abstract: The rapid growth of the low-altitude economy drives increasingly autonomous unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) operations, giving rise to low-altitude embodied intelligence (LAEI), in which sensing, communication, computation, and control (SC$^3$) are tightly integrated to enable closed-loop interaction, ensuring timely, effective, and safe responses in complex or unknown environments. This article systematically explores the LAEI networks, from its fundamental architecture to the diverse scenarios that it can support. We examine key enabling techniques that sustain timely information exchange and effective decision feedback within the $\text{SC}^3$ closed loop. A representative low-altitude UAV mission in an unknown urban area is presented as a case study, where the UAV provides communication services and performs environmental sensing to inform closed-loop control, illustrating how coordinated $\text{SC}^3$ capabilities enable efficient and responsive operation. By identifying major challenges and outlining future research directions, this work serves as a cornerstone for developing next-generation low-altitude intelligent systems.

</details>


### [494] [AI-Native Autonomous Infrastructure (ANAI): A Formal Framework for the Next General-Purpose Technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24294)
*Hidir Selcuk Nogay*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一个形式化框架，将AI视为系统性基础设施转型而非单纯计算突破，定义了AI原生自主基础设施（ANAI）概念，并通过自主性指数、基础设施耦合系数和技术转型潜力三个定量指标来评估这一转型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对AI的解读主要强调性能扩展而非结构性转型，缺乏评估AI作为下一代通用目的技术的系统性框架。

Method: 提出ANAI概念，构建了自主性指数、基础设施耦合系数和技术转型潜力三个定量指标，并形式化了自主性与基础设施嵌入的联合扩展动力学，推导出范式转变的阈值条件，引入相空间表征系统转型。

Result: ANAI机制表现出递归的能量-计算反馈循环，其中AI系统既增加计算需求又优化支撑其的基础设施，从而加速基础设施嵌入，产生过渡潜力的超线性增长。

Conclusion: 通过将分析焦点从模型性能转向基础设施自主性和耦合强度，本研究为评估AI是否构成下一代通用目的技术提供了概念和数学基础。

Abstract: Artificial intelligence is increasingly described as a candidate next generation general purpose technology (GPT). However, existing interpretations predominantly emphasize performance scaling rather than structural transformation. This paper introduces a formal framework for evaluating AI as a systemic infrastructural transition rather than merely a computational breakthrough. We propose the concept of AI Native Autonomous Infrastructure (ANAI), defined as a regime in which decision autonomy becomes embedded within critical infrastructures. The framework operationalizes this transition through three quantitative constructs: the Autonomy Index (AIx), the Infrastructure Coupling Coefficient (ICC), and the Technological Transition Potential (TTP). We formalize the joint scaling dynamics of autonomy and infrastructural embedding, derive threshold conditions for paradigm transition, and introduce a phase-space representation of systemic transformation. A temporal transition model further illustrates how nonlinear coevolution between autonomy and infrastructure integration produces super linear growth in transition potential. Unlike prior GPT cycles, the ANAI regime exhibits a recursive energy computation feedback loop in which AI systems both increase computational demand and optimize the infrastructures that sustain them. This feedback mechanism accelerates infrastructural embedding and differentiates AI driven transformation from previous technological revolutions. By shifting analytical focus from model performance to infrastructural autonomy and coupling intensity, this study offers a conceptual and mathematical foundation for assessing whether artificial intelligence constitutes the next general purpose technology.

</details>


### [495] [A Realistic Discrete Event Simulation model for Ambulance Location and Deployment within a regional Emergency Medical Service](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24394)
*Alberto De Santis,Stefania Iannazzo,Fabio Ingravalle,Stefano Lucidi,Massimo Maurici,Giulia Riccardi,Massimo Roma,Antonio Vinci*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出通用离散事件模拟模型，优化区域急救系统救护车部署，基于意大利拉齐奥地区案例验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 急救系统效率高度依赖救护车基地部署，现有方法缺乏对随机行为和系统工作流的准确模拟。

Method: 构建离散事件模拟模型，整合多源信息，复现救护车系统操作流程。

Result: 案例研究显示模型能准确模拟系统运行，场景分析帮助管理者提升系统效率和响应速度。

Conclusion: 模型可有效支持区域急救系统的管理和优化决策。

Abstract: The objective of Emergency Medical Services (EMSs) is to promptly respond to calls from citizens for first aid, providing pre-hospital care and, if necessary, to transfer patients to an appropriate Emergency Department (ED) by ambulance. The efficiency of such a system strongly depends on the deployment of ambulance home bases, i.e., locations where ambulances and their crews are strategically positioned, ready to respond to emergency calls. This paper presents a general Discrete Event Simulation (DES) model designed to capture the stochastic behaviour and workflow of regional ambulance emergency systems. The proposed model incorporates and integrates information collected from different sources, reproducing very accurately the operation of the ambulance system, thus allowing a more comprehensive and realistic analysis. To show the applicability and reliability of the proposed general model, a case study provided by the Azienda Regionale Emergenza Sanitaria - ARES 118 (an Italian Regional Emergency Medical Services Authority - ARES~118}) is presented. It concerns a territory within the Lazio region of Italy, including a medium-size city along with sparsely populated areas. The reported results about scenario analyses highlight how the model we propose can be fruitfully used by the managers to improve effectiveness and quickness of the entire regional EMS system.

</details>


### [496] [The Fragility of Learning LQG Controllers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24442)
*Bruce D. Lee,Anastasios Tsiamis,Nikolai Matni,Manfred Morari,John Lygeros*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文推导了部分可观测线性二次高斯（LQG）控制器的信息论下界，展示了学习样本复杂度与系统脆弱性之间的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续控制样本复杂度刻画仅适用于完全观测情况，而部分观测系统的学习复杂度尚不明确。

Method: 通过推导ε-局部极小极大超额代价下界，利用LQG代价的黑塞矩阵和探索策略的Fisher信息量来量化样本复杂度。

Result: 在经典脆弱鲁棒控制实例（如Doyle LQG反例和非最小相位系统）上，高样本复杂度与系统脆弱性直接相关。

Conclusion: 确定性等价综合法渐近最优，任务导向的实验设计和系统协同设计对部分观测控制的学习效率至关重要。

Abstract: Learning methods are increasingly used to synthesize controllers from data, yet existing sample-complexity characterizations for continuous control are sharp only in the fully observed setting. This paper studies the partially observed case by deriving information-theoretic lower bounds for learning Linear Quadratic Gaussian (LQG) controllers from offline trajectories generated by a (linear) exploration policy. We prove an $\varepsilon$-local minimax excess-cost lower bound that applies to any algorithm mapping the offline dataset to a stabilizing linear controller. The bound is expressed in terms of the Hessian of the LQG cost with respect to model parameters and the inverse Fisher Information induced by the exploration policy. We further provide system-theoretic characterizations of these objects, enabling transparent construction of hard instances. Instantiating the bound on classical fragile robust-control examples, including variants of the Doyle LQG fragility counterexample and non-minimum-phase systems, demonstrates when fragile robust control problems translate into high sample complexity for learning-enabled control. These results suggest the asymptotic optimality of certainty-equivalent synthesis and motivate the importance of both task-directed experiment design and system co-design for sample-efficient learning in partially observed control.

</details>


### [497] [Sliding Mode Control for Safe Trajectory Tracking with Moving Obstacles Avoidance: Experimental Validation on Planar Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24518)
*Shubham Sawarkar,P Sangeerth,S Saharsh,Pushpak Jagtap*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个统一的控制框架，用于移动机器人的鲁棒轨迹跟踪和动态障碍物规避。该框架结合了广义运动学变换、滑模控制和碰撞锥控制障碍函数安全滤波器，并在多种机器人平台上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的移动机器人控制方法在面对动态环境中的障碍物规避时，往往缺乏统一性和鲁棒性。特别是，阿克曼转向机器人的滑模控制器设计尚未被充分探索。

Method: 通过广义运动学变换将车辆动力学转化为严格反馈形式，设计滑模控制策略实现鲁棒轨迹跟踪，并集成碰撞锥控制障碍函数安全滤波器以确保动态障碍物规避。

Result: 仿真和真实实验（阿克曼转向车、差速驱动机器人、四旋翼无人机）验证了该方法在存在外部扰动下实现渐近跟踪并严格遵守避碰约束。

Conclusion: 该统一控制框架对不同移动机器人平台具有通用性和鲁棒性，特别是首次成功应用于阿克曼转向机器人的滑模控制器设计。

Abstract: This paper presents a unified control framework for robust trajectory tracking and moving obstacle avoidance applicable to a broad class of mobile robots. By formulating a generalized kinematic transformation, we convert diverse vehicle dynamics into a strict feedback form, facilitating the design of a Sliding Mode Control (SMC) strategy for precise and robust reference tracking. To ensure operational safety in dynamic environments, the tracking controller is integrated with a Collision Cone Control Barrier Function (C3BF) based safety filter. The proposed architecture guarantees asymptotic tracking in the presence of external disturbances while strictly enforcing collision avoidance constraints. The novelty of this work lies in designing a sliding mode controller for ground robots like the Ackermann drive, which has not been done before. The efficacy and versatility of the approach are validated through numerical simulations and extensive real-world experiments on three distinct platforms: an Ackermann-steered vehicle, a differential drive robot, and a quadrotor drone. Video of the experiments are available at https://youtu.be/dWcxwum96vk

</details>


### [498] [Reduced-Order Data Assimilation for Thermospheric Density Using Physics-informed SINDyc Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24646)
*Sriram Narayanan,Daniele Sicoli,Piyush Mehta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出一种数据驱动降阶热层模型，结合卡尔曼滤波器同化原位密度观测，在低成本下实现高精度热层质量密度估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统物理模型计算成本高，经验模型缺乏时变状态，现有方法难以平衡精度与效率。

Method: 从TIE-GCM推导自回归稀疏非线性动力学降阶模型（SINDy_c-AR），并同化多卫星（CHAMP、GRACE等）密度观测，以DMDc为参考。

Result: 同化可显著降低密度估计误差（尤其在磁暴和单星覆盖时）；SINDy_c-AR在训练场景下优于DMDc，但DMDc在未训练场景（2024年Swarm-C）表现更好。

Conclusion: 降阶模型同化能有效改进热层密度预测，但经验模型在远离同化轨道时仍具优势，需进一步优化泛化能力。

Abstract: Accurate estimation of thermospheric mass density is a prerequisite for orbit prediction and space situational awareness, where the upper atmosphere responds nonlinearly to solar and geomagnetic forcing across several orders of magnitude. Physics-based general circulation models resolve this response but are computationally expensive, while empirical models run cheaply but lack a time-evolving atmospheric state. This work couples a data-driven reduced-order thermospheric model with a Kalman filter that assimilates in situ density observations. An autoregressive Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with control (SINDy$_c$-AR) reduced-order model derived from the Thermosphere-Ionosphere-Electrodynamics General Circulation Model (TIE-GCM) captures the dominant modes of variability and their dependence on solar and geomagnetic drivers at a fraction of the parent model's cost. Density observations from CHAMP, GRACE, GRACE-FO, GOCE, and Swarm are assimilated across a range of orbital configurations and geomagnetic conditions, with a linear DMDc model evaluated as a reference. Assimilation reduces density estimation error relative to open-loop predictions, most visibly during geomagnetic storms and under single-satellite coverage. SINDy$_c$-AR and DMDc perform comparably on assimilated orbits; on withheld orbits, SINDy$_c$-AR is more accurate in the in-training scenarios while DMDc is better in the out-of-training 2024 Swarm-C case. Benchmarks against NRLMSIS~2.1 and HASDM (2000--2019, where available) show that empirical references can outperform the assimilated model far from the assimilated track, so results are framed as improvements over the open-loop forecast.

</details>


### [499] [Reachability Analysis of the State Transition and State Covariance Matrices for an LTV System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24691)
*Fengjiao Liu,Yixiao Zhang,Panagiotis Tsiotras*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了线性时变系统在有限时间区间内的闭环状态转移矩阵和状态协方差矩阵的可达性，基于矩阵Riccati微分方程的解给出了可达集的特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了深入理解线性时变系统的状态反馈控制和协方差演变特性，特别是在系统不完全可控情况下的可达性分析。

Method: 在温和假设下，利用矩阵Riccati微分方程（RDE）的解，分别刻画从单位矩阵出发的闭环终端状态转移矩阵可达集，以及从任意正定初始协方差矩阵出发的终端协方差矩阵可达集。

Result: 给出了闭环终端状态转移矩阵的可达集特征，以及非可控线性时变系统中终端状态协方差矩阵的可达集。

Conclusion: 通过RDE的解成功描述了LTV系统中相关矩阵的可达性，扩展了对系统可控性和协方差可达性的理解。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the reachability of two closely related matrices appearing in the analysis of linear time-varying (LTV) systems over a finite time interval, namely, its closed-loop state transition matrix via a state feedback control and its state covariance matrix starting from some given initial state covariance matrix. Under a mild assumption, we first characterize the set of closed-loop terminal state transition matrices reachable from the identity matrix using controls of the state feedback form. Then, we provide the set of terminal state covariance matrices reachable from any given positive definite initial state covariance matrix when the LTV system is not necessarily controllable. Both results are based on the solutions of corresponding matrix Riccati differential equations (RDE).

</details>


### [500] [Exploiting Differential Flatness for Efficient Learning-based Model Predictive Control of Constrained Multi-Input Control Affine Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24706)
*Tobias A. Farger,Adam W. Hall,Angela P. Schoellig*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种利用微分平坦性的学习控制方法，通过系统扩展和块对角化代价函数，处理多输入非线性仿射系统，满足输入和状态约束，仅需两次顺序凸优化即可实现概率李雅普诺夫递减，仿真和实验验证效率优于高斯过程模型预测控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于微分平坦性的学习控制方法存在忽略输入约束、仅适用于单输入系统或特定平台等局限性，且学习控制器的计算效率较低，限制其实用性。

Method: 采用系统扩展和块对角化代价函数，处理通用的多输入非线性仿射系统，通过两次顺序凸优化满足输入约束和半空间平坦状态约束，并保证概率李雅普诺夫递减。

Result: 仿真中性能与高斯过程模型预测控制相似但计算效率提升多倍，硬件实验实现了具有竞争力的轨迹跟踪表现。

Conclusion: 所提方法在保证控制性能的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于多输入机器人系统，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Learning-based control techniques use data from past trajectories to control systems with uncertain dynamics. However, learning-based controllers are often computationally inefficient, limiting their practicality. To address this limitation, we propose a learning-based controller that exploits differential flatness, a property of many robotic systems. Recent research on using flatness for learning-based control either is limited in that it (i) ignores input constraints, (ii) applies only to single-input systems, or (iii) is tailored to specific platforms. In contrast, our approach uses a system extension and block-diagonal cost formulation to control general multi-input, nonlinear, affine systems. Furthermore, it satisfies input and half-space flat state constraints and guarantees probabilistic Lyapunov decrease using only two sequential convex optimizations. We show that our approach performs similarly to, but is multiple times more efficient than, a Gaussian process model predictive controller in simulation, and achieves competitive tracking in real hardware experiments.

</details>


### [501] [Data-Driven Privacy-Preserving Modeling and Frequency Regulation with Aggregated Electric Vehicles via Bilinear Hidden Markov Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24724)
*Yiping Liu,Xiaozhe Wang,Geza Joos*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种数据驱动、隐私保护的聚合电动汽车频率调节框架，无需个体信息即可实现准确估计与有效调节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖个体行驶信息与参数，存在隐私泄露和数据质量问题。

Method: 采用数据驱动建模与控制框架，保护隐私且不收集个体电动汽车信息。

Result: 仿真验证了方法的准确性与有效性，且在SOC数据不准确时优于模型法和联邦学习法。

Conclusion: 该方法能有效保护隐私并实现频率调节，具有实际可扩展性。

Abstract: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology allows bidirectional power flow for real-time grid support, making electric vehicles (EVs) well-suited for ancillary services such as frequency regulation. However, existing methods for flexibility estimation and coordinating aggregated EVs often rely on individual EV traveling information (e.g., arrival/departure time) and/or characteristic parameters (e.g., charging efficiency, battery capacity) as well as real-time state-of-charge (SOC), which raises privacy concerns and faces data quality issues. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a data-driven, privacy-preserving modeling and control framework for frequency regulation using aggregated EVs. The proposed method can provide accurate estimation for power outputs and flexibility of aggregated EVs and carry out effective frequency regulation without any individual EV information. %preserving user privacy and ensuring practical scalability. Simulation results validate the accuracy and effectiveness of the proposed method, which also outperforms the model-based and federated learning-based method under SOC data inaccuracies.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [502] [Non-Destructive Prediction of Fruit Ripeness and Firmness Using Hyperspectral Imaging and Lightweight Machine Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22788)
*Phongsakon Mark Konrad,Casper Kunstmann-Olsen,Jacek Fiutowski,Serkan Ayvaz*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 该研究系统评估了20种经典机器学习算法在五种水果采后品质评估中的表现，发现树模型能超越深度学习模型，且仅需三个可见光波长即可恢复94%以上精度，为低成本多光谱传感器替代昂贵设备提供了可能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非破坏性水果品质评估依赖昂贵的高光谱相机和计算密集型深度学习模型，需要GPU资源和大规模训练数据，限制了实际农业应用场景的可行性。

Method: 采用交叉验证实验设计和贝叶斯超参数优化，系统对比20种经典机器学习算法，结合类别平衡和光谱变换等数据预处理策略分析其对预测精度的影响。

Result: 树模型性能优于HCFR-Net等最新深度学习模型；仅三个可见光波长可恢复全光谱94%以上的精度；数据预处理与算法选择对预测精度贡献相当。

Conclusion: 低成本多光谱传感器与轻量级机器学习模型可作为高光谱相机和复杂深度学习方法的经济有效替代方案，用于农作物品质分级环节。

Abstract: Post-harvest fruit quality assessment is essential for reducing food waste, yet reliable non-destructive methods typically depend on expensive hyperspectral cameras and computationally intensive deep learning models. These systems typically require GPU resources, large-scale training data, and domain expertise, limiting their feasibility for many real-world agricultural settings. This study systematically evaluates 20 classical machine learning algorithms on hyperspectral imaging data for simultaneous ripeness classification and firmness prediction across five fruit species, using cross-validated experimental design with Bayesian hyperparameter optimization. Data preprocessing strategy, particularly class balancing and spectral transformations, contributes as much to prediction accuracy as algorithm choice. Our results show that tree-based machine learning models can outperform state-of-the-art deep earning models reported in Fruit-HSNet. Moreover, the findings indicate that only three visible-range wavelengths are needed to recover over 94% of full-spectrum accuracy, demonstrating that low-cost multispectral sensors combined with lightweight machine learning models can serve as practical alternatives to expensive hyperspectral cameras and complex deep learning approaches for practical fruit quality sorting.

</details>


### [503] [Fixed-phase Resonance Tracking for Fast Nonlinear Resonant Ultrasound Spectroscopy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22889)
*Jan Kober,Radovan Zeman,Marco Scalerandi*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了模型辅助的离散时间共振跟踪方法，通过相位关系维持共振条件，避免全频率扫描，提高了NRUS实验的测量速度和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NRUS实验依赖重复扫描共振曲线，受材料参数快慢动态演化影响，对测量协议敏感。

Method: 基于预设相位关系定义共振，利用线性化频率-相位模型迭代更新激励频率，并可选前馈校正抑制瞬态波建立。

Result: 在砂岩棒上通过NRUS和松弛协议验证，表明测量速度和模式稳定性显著影响非线性指标，与传统方法对比揭示了差异。

Conclusion: 该框架不限于非线性声学，可推广至参数缓慢演化的任意共振系统。

Abstract: Nonlinear Resonant Ultrasound Spectroscopy (NRUS) experiments that rely on repeated sampling of resonance curves are inherently sensitive to measurement protocol due to evolution of material parameters caused by fast and slow dynamic effects. We introduce a model-assisted discrete-time resonance tracking method that maintains a system at its instantaneous resonance condition without the need to acquire full frequency sweeps. Resonance is defined through a prescribed phase relation between excitation and response, and the excitation frequency is iteratively updated using a linearized frequency--phase model. The procedure allows controlled suppression of transient wave buildup using optional feedforward correction with respect to external control parameter. The method is demonstrated on NRUS and on conditioning--relaxation protocol conducted on sandstone bar, providing estimates of resonance frequency and damping. Comparison with conventional approaches shows that measurement speed and mode stability significantly influence the inferred nonlinear indicators. The proposed framework is not limited to nonlinear acoustics and can be applied to arbitrary resonant systems with slowly evolving parameters.

</details>


### [504] [Generalizable CT-Free PET Attenuation and Scatter Correction for Pediatric Patients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22894)
*Jia-Mian Wu,Jun Liu,Siqi Li,Xiaoya Wang,Shibai Yin,Huanyu Luo,Lingling Zheng,Qiang Gao,Jigang Yang,Tai-Xiang Jiang*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了GPCN，一种双域网络，用于CT-free的PET衰减和散射校正，在儿科PET成像中表现出跨扫描仪和放射示踪剂的鲁棒性，减少了辐射暴露。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CT校正增加辐射暴露，尤其不利于儿科成像；现有CT-free方法在跨域场景中性能下降，限制了临床使用。

Method: GPCN结合多频带上下文精炼模块和频率感知频谱解耦模块，利用小波多尺度分解和傅里叶域振幅/相位精炼，分离不变拓扑结构与领域特定噪声。

Result: 在1085例儿科PET扫描（两台扫描仪、五种放射示踪剂）上，GPCN在联合训练和零样本跨域评估中优于基线方法，保持了稳定定量精度。

Conclusion: GPCN实现了稳定准确的CT-free校正，有潜力降低儿科CT辐射剂量（本队列中平均有效剂量10.8 mSv）。

Abstract: Computed tomography (CT)-based attenuation and scatter correction improves quantitative PET but adds radiation exposure that is particularly undesirable in pediatric imaging. Existing CT-free methods are commonly trained in homogeneous settings and often degrade under scanner or radiotracer shifts, which limits their clinical utility. We propose the Generalizable PET Correction Network (GPCN), a dual-domain network for domain-robust CT-free PET attenuation and scatter correction. GPCN combines a multi-band contextual refinement module, which models pediatric anatomical variability through wavelet-based multiscale decomposition and long-range spatial context modeling, with a frequency-aware spectral decoupling module, which performs coordinate-conditioned amplitude/phase refinement in the Fourier domain. By synergizing multi-band spatial contextual modeling with asymmetric frequency-spectrum decoupling, the network explicitly separates invariant topological structures from domain-specific noise, thereby achieving precise quantitative recovery of both anatomical organs and focal lesions. This design aims to separate anatomy-dominant structures from domain-sensitive spectral residuals and to improve robustness across heterogeneous imaging conditions. We train and evaluate the method on 1085 pediatric whole-body PET scans acquired with two scanners and five radiotracers. In both joint training and zero-shot cross-domain evaluation, GPCN outperforms representative baselines and maintains stable quantitative accuracy on unseen scanner-tracer combinations. The method is further supported by ablation, region-wise quantitative analysis, and downstream segmentation experiments. In our cohort, the CT component of the conventional protocol corresponded to an average effective dose of 10.8 mSv, indicating the potential clinical value of reliable CT-free correction for pediatric PET.

</details>


### [505] [Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network for Hepatobiliary Phase Liver MRI Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22904)
*Qiuli Wang,Xinhuan Sun,Fengxi Chen,Yongxu Liu,Jie Cheng,Lin Chen,Jiafei Chen,Yue Zhang,Xiaoming Li,Wei Chen*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出TriPF-Net，利用门静脉期和动脉期序列合成肝胆期图像，减少延迟扫描时间，提升工作效率和图像质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 常规HBP获取需长时间延迟，导致效率低下和运动伪影风险，亟需替代方案。

Method: 构建TriPF-Net，包括增强区域引导编码器和动态特征统一模块，采用区域引导序列融合损失，并整合临床变量（年龄、性别、胆红素、白蛋白）增强生理一致性。

Result: 在内部数据集上MAE=10.65、PSNR=23.27、SSIM=0.76；外部验证集上MAE=12.41、PSNR=23.11、SSIM=0.78，优于传统方法。

Conclusion: TriPF-Net能灵活合成HBP图像，消除延迟扫描需求，提高临床工作流程和病灶显示效果。

Abstract: Gadoxetate disodium-enhanced MRI is essential for the detection and characterization of hepatocellular carcinoma. However, acquisition of the hepatobiliary phase (HBP) requires a prolonged post-contrast delay, which reduces workflow efficiency and increases the risk of motion artifacts. In this study, we propose a Triple-Phase Sequential Fusion Network (TriPF-Net) to synthesize HBP images by leveraging the sequential information from pre-HBP sequences: while T1-weighted imaging serves as the indispensable baseline, the model adaptively integrates arterial-phase (AP) and venous-phase (VP) features when available. By modeling the tissue-specific contrast uptake and excretion dynamics across these three phases, TriPF-Net ensures robust HBP synthesis even under the stochastic absence of one or both dynamic contrast-enhanced sequences. The framework comprises an Enhanced Region-Guided Encoder and a Dynamic Feature Unification Module, optimized with a Region-Guided Sequential Fusion Loss to maintain physiological consistency. In addition, clinical variables, including age, sex, total bilirubin, and albumin, are incorporated to enhance physiological consistency. Compared with conventional methods, TriPF-Net achieved superior performance on datasets from two centers. On the internal dataset, the model achieved an MAE of 10.65, a PSNR of 23.27, and an SSIM of 0.76. On the external validation dataset, the corresponding values were 12.41, 23.11, and 0.78, respectively. This flexible solution enhances clinical workflow and lesion depiction, potentially eliminating the need for delayed HBP acquisition in HCC imaging.

</details>


### [506] [CT-Guided Spatially-varying Regularization for Voxel-Wise Deformable Whole-Body PET Registration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22905)
*Xiangcen Wu,Ruohua Chen,Sichun Li,Qianye Yang,Sheng Liu,Jianjun Liu,Zhaoheng Xie*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于CT引导的空间变化正则化策略，用于全身跨示踪剂PET配准，通过解剖自适应正则化图替代全局权重，显著提升配准性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全身变形配准中存在解剖异质性，刚性结构（如骨骼）需强正则化而软组织需弱正则化，现有单一全局正则化权重无法适应这种差异。

Method: 利用PET/CT扫描中的CT体素信息构建逐体素的正则化映射，取代传统全局权重，实现解剖自适应的密集位移场（DDF）正则化。

Result: 在296例患者的临床PET/CT数据集（含18F-PSMA和18F-FDG）上，该方法在全身配准和器官级对齐上均显著优于弱监督基线。

Conclusion: CT引导的空间变化正则化能有效处理解剖异质性，为全身PET配准提供更合理的变形约束。

Abstract: Whole-body Positron Emission Tomography (PET) registration is essential for multi-parametric tumor characterization and assessment of metastatic disease progression. In deep learning-based deformable registration, the dense displacement field (DDF) regularizer is crucial for stabilizing optimization and preventing unrealistic deformations in large 3D volumes. A key challenge in whole-body deformable registration is anatomical heterogeneity, rigid structures (e.g., bones) should undergo stronger regularization, whereas soft tissues require more flexible deformation and weaker constraints. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective CT-guided spatially-varying regularization strategy for whole-body cross-tracer deformable PET registration. The key idea is to use the paired CT volume from the PET/CT acquisition to construct a voxel-wise regularization map for the DDF, replacing the conventional single global regularization weight. This yields anatomy-adaptive regularization strength across rigid and soft tissues. The proposed method is evaluated on a real clinical cross-tracer PET/CT dataset of 296 patients involving 18F-PSMA and 18F-FDG, showing that the proposed method achieves statistically significant improvements over weakly-supervised registration baseline in both whole-body registration performance and organ-wise alignment.

</details>


### [507] [GS-DOT: Gaussian splatting-based image reconstruction for diffuse optical tomography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23675)
*Jingjing Jiang*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了GS-DOT，一种基于高斯溅射（GS）的漫射光学断层成像（DOT）重建框架，首次将GS算法应用于光子扩散领域，通过解析梯度和Adam优化拟合时间分辨点扩散函数，实现了高精度且对噪声鲁棒的吸收系数重建，并显著降低了内存需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利用高斯溅射在图形渲染中的优势来解决漫射光学断层成像的重建问题，提高定位和量化精度、降低内存消耗。

Method: 将吸收系数表示为各向异性高斯原语的稀疏和，用解析梯度和Adam优化来拟合测量的时间分辨点扩散函数，并用扩散函数替代射线传输函数模拟光在散射介质中的传播。

Result: 在合成组织模型上，对干净和噪声信号均实现了高精度的吸收图定位与量化，表现出对噪声的高鲁棒性，并大幅减少了内存需求。

Conclusion: GS-DOT是DOT重建的有效新方法，结合了高斯溅射的灵活性与扩散模型的准确性，在精度、鲁棒性和内存效率方面具有优势。

Abstract: This work presents GS-DOT, a novel image reconstruction framework based on Gaussian Splatting (GS) for diffuse optical tomography (DOT). Inspired by GS for rendering applications, absorption coefficients are represented as a sparse sum of anisotropic Gaussian primitives optimized to fit measured time-resolved point-spread functions through analytic gradients and Adam optimization. This is the first adaptation of GS algorithms in the photon diffusion regime, where the ray transport function is replaced by the diffusion functions to enable accurate modeling of light transport in highly scattering media. Validation on synthetic tissue models demonstrate high accuracy in localization and quantification of reconstructed absorption maps for both clean and noisy signals. GS-DOT has demonstrated high robustness to noise and showed a huge reduction in memory demand.

</details>


### [508] [Shared-kernel Wavelet Neural Networks for Poisson Image Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24000)
*Yuanhao Gong,Tan Tang,Qianyan Liu*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 利用稀疏拉普拉斯场表示图像，并通过共享核小波神经网络高速高精度重建图像。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 拉普拉斯算子生成的图像场具有稀疏性和稳定分布，且图像可从其拉普拉斯场唯一重建，因此研究这种表示方法。

Method: 提出共享核小波神经网络求解泊松方程，该网络参数极少（<0.0002M）、线性计算复杂度，实现实时高精度重建。

Result: 在数百张图像上验证了拉普拉斯场的稀疏性和稳定分布，所提网络在重建精度上优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 稀疏拉普拉斯场能高效表示图像，所提网络紧凑快速，适用于图像压缩、低光增强、目标跟踪等多种应用。

Abstract: The Laplacian operator transforms the image into its Laplacian field, which usually is sparse and satisfies a stable distribution. On the other hand, an image can be uniquely reconstructed from its Laplacian field via solving a Poisson equation with a proper boundary condition. Such uniqueness is mathematically guaranteed. Thanks to these properties, we propose to use the sparse Laplacian field to present the image. We first show that the Laplacian field is sparse and satisfies a stable distribution on hundreds images. Then, we show that the image can be accurately reconstruct from its Laplacian field. For the reconstruction task, we propose a shared-kernel wavelet neural network, which solves the Poisson equation and has three advantages. First, it has less than {\bf 0.0002M} parameters, which is compact enough for most of devices. Second, it has linear computation complexity, leading to a real-time reconstruction. Third, it achieves higher accuracy than previous methods. Several numerical experiments are conducted to show the effectiveness and efficiency of the sparse Laplacian field and the proposed Poisson solver. The proposed method can be applied in a large range of applications such as image compression, low light enhancement, object tracking, etc.

</details>


### [509] [Deep Learning-Enabled Dissolved Oxygen Sensing in Biofouling Environments for Ocean Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24236)
*Nikolaos Salaris,Adrien Desjardins,Manish K. Tiwari*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出结合摄像头DO传感器与视觉变换器物理信息神经网络(ViT-PINN)的传感范式，在生物淤积条件下实现高保真溶解氧监测，误差约2 μmol/L。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低成本DO传感器因信号漂移和生物淤积难以长期可靠监测，亟需抗干扰的智能传感方案。

Method: 采用掺杂磷光染料的微结构聚合物膜传感器，结合嵌入Stern-Volmer方程的ViT-PINN，通过藻类水槽14天加速淤积数据训练，并用深度集成估计不确定性。

Result: ViT-PINN将平均绝对误差降低92%（对比统计方法）和89%（对比传统ML），达到约2 μmol/L绝对误差。

Conclusion: ViT-PINN结合物理约束与深度学习，可显著提升生物淤积条件下DO传感的精度与自诊断能力。

Abstract: The escalating climate crisis and ecosystem degradation demand intelligent, low-cost sensors capable of robust, long-term monitoring in real-world environments. Absolute dissolved oxygen (DO) concentration is a key parameter for predicting climate tipping points. Inexpensive optoelectronic sensors based on microstructured polymer films doped with phosphorescent dyes could be readily deployable; however, signal drift and marine biofouling remain major challenges. Here, we introduce a sensing paradigm that combines camera-based DO sensors with a visual transformer (ViT)-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) for high-fidelity sensing under biofouling conditions. Training and testing data were obtained from an algae-laden water tank over 14 days to capture accelerated biofouling. The ViT-PINN, which embeds the Stern-Volmer (SV) equation into the loss function, reduces mean average error (MAE) by 92% and 89% compared to classical statistical and ML approaches, achieving ~2 umol/L absolute error. A deep ensemble further quantifies predictive uncertainty, enabling self-diagnostic sensing.

</details>


### [510] [Semantic Segmentation for Histopathology using Learned Regularization based on Global Proportions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24347)
*Yangping Li,Thomas Pinetz,Michael Hölzel,Marieta Toma,Alexander Effland*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种两阶段框架VSLP，仅使用全局标签比例推断病理图像的密集分割，无需像素级标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 病理组织中，组织类型的空间分布和比例是疾病进展的关键指标，但通常缺乏像素级标注，而全局比例容易获得。

Method: 两阶段框架：先利用预训练transformer模型和测试时增强生成像素级置信度，再通过变分优化（含Wasserstein数据保真项和正则化器）融合这些估计。

Result: 在公共数据集上优于现有弱监督和无监督方法，并在病理学家标注的真实数据集上大幅领先现有技术。

Conclusion: VSLP能够从标签比例生成可解释的密集分割，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: In pathology, the spatial distribution and proportions of tissue types are key indicators of disease progression, and are more readily available than fine-grained annotations. However, these assessments are rarely mapped to pixel-wise segmentation. The task is fundamentally underdetermined, as many spatially distinct segmentations can satisfy the same global proportions in the absence of pixel-wise constraints. To address this, we introduce Variational Segmentation from Label Proportions (VSLP), a two-stage framework that infers dense segmentations from global label proportions, without any pixel-level annotations. This framework first leverages a pre-trained transformer model with test-time augmentation to produce a pixel-wise confidence estimate. In the second stage, these estimates are fused by solving a variational optimization problem that incorporates a Wasserstein data fidelity term alongside a learned regularizer. Unlike end-to-end networks, our variational method can visualize the fidelity-regularization energy, resulting in more interpretable segmentation. We validate our approach on two public datasets, achieving superior performance over existing weakly supervised and unsupervised methods. For one of these datasets, proportions have been estimated by an experienced pathologist to provide a realistic benchmark to the community. Furthermore, the method scales to an in-house dataset with noisy pathologist labels, severely outperforming state-of-the-art methods, thereby demonstrating practical applicability. The code and data will be made publicly available upon acceptance at https://github.com/xiaoliangpi/VSLP.

</details>
